property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Python39\Scripts\;C:\Program Files\Python39\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;";C:\Program Files\platform-tools";";C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools";C:\Users\HP\Downloads\platform-tools-latest-windows;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-24\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 9.5\bin\;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\MinGW\bin;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Packages\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.11_qbz5n2kfra8p0\LocalCache\local-packages\Python311\Scripts;C:\Users\HP\.dotnet\tools;D:\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2024.1.2\bin;;C:\Users\HP\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity\bin;.

testcase.name: registerTest
testcase.system-out: registartion Success Message: Your account was created successfully. You are now logged in. registration test passed successfully
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. Mar 24, 2026 3:47:05 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 146 Mar 24, 2026 3:47:05 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.154. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.18.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
